data.name: PublicUserNameCharacters
data.value: The public username may only contain letters, numbers, periods, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: PublicUserNameExists
data.value: This public username is already taken.

data.name: ProfileImageInvalid
data.value: The selected file could not be read as an image.

data.name: ProfileImageTooLarge
data.value: The profile photo must be 5 MB or smaller.

data.name: ProfileImageUnsupportedType
data.value: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.

data.name: TrainerVerificationInvalid
data.value: The coach verification code is invalid.

data.name: TrainerVerificationNotConfigured
data.value: Coach verification is not configured yet.
